Parameter.name: SamplingRateValue
Parameter.descriptions: SamplingRateValue, DUT Sampling is based on this number.

Parameter.name: WaferSampleRateValue
Parameter.descriptions: WaferSampleRateValue, Wafer Sampling is based on this number.

Parameter.name: WaferSampleList
Parameter.descriptions: WaferSampleList, DUT Sampling is based on this wafer list.

Parameter.name: SampleOption
Parameter.descriptions: Sample options. This options provide total 4 different mode of operation, it will be decided whether DUT sampling, WAFER sampling, WAFER_LIST or SAMPLE_LOWEST is to be done.

Parameter.name: ShouldFirstBeSampled
Parameter.descriptions: Should first be sampled. When this parameter is true, first unit will be first sample. Otherwise the first DUT sample to be sample will be the one with same number as SamplingRateValue.

Parameter.name: PrintItuffExitPort
Parameter.descriptions: PrintItuffExitport, DUT Sampling is based on this number.

Parameter.name: GlobalSampleRate
Parameter.descriptions: Global sample rate. If true, sampling happen in test-program level, where sampleRate is centralized in uservar. Otherwise it is test-method level or so called local sampleRate.

Parameter.name: SampleLowestWaferTrayList
Parameter.descriptions: SampleLowestWaferTrayList, list of wafer/tray to be executed for lowest sample.

Parameter.name: SampleLowestValue
Parameter.descriptions: SampleLowestValue, lowest numbered wafers/trays to be sampled.

Parameter.name: IsSampleLowestTrayType
Parameter.descriptions: Is sample lowest type tray or wafer. This parameter will be in use when sampleOption is SAMPLE_LOWEST. If true, tray sampling is taking place. Otherwise, it is wafer sampling.

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
